meta.scope: These Terms apply to the service, including current and future features, systems, pages, APIs, support channels, integrations, and related functionality.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using the service, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms. If you do not agree, you must stop using the service. Continued use after updates means you accept the revised Terms.

sections.title: Account Responsibility
sections.content: You are fully responsible for your account, credentials, linked services, devices, sessions, tokens, and all activity conducted through them, whether authorized or unauthorized, direct or indirect.

sections.title: Authentication, Recovery, Email, and 2FA
sections.content: Recovery is not guaranteed. Verification may depend on linked accounts or email, and delivery failures, lost access, expired sessions, revoked tokens, or authentication problems may prevent restoration without liability.

sections.title: Usernames and Identity
sections.content: Usernames and identity-related data may be changed, restricted, recycled, removed, displayed, stored, or processed at any time. Misleading, offensive, impersonating, or disruptive usernames are prohibited.

sections.title: Linked Accounts and Dependencies
sections.content: Certain features may require linked external accounts such as Discord, Roblox, email, or similar services. You are responsible for keeping linked accounts valid, accessible, and correctly connected.

sections.title: Data Visibility and Accuracy
sections.content: Some information may be public or visible to staff or other users. Displayed values may be delayed, cached, incorrect, or inconsistent. Backend records control over any displayed value.

sections.title: Rewards, Quests, Balances, and Virtual Items
sections.content: Rewards, quests, balances, statistics, virtual items, and promotional systems are offered as available and may be corrected, delayed, reduced, removed, reset, or cancelled at any time without guarantee of issuance or permanence.

sections.title: Support and Ticket Handling
sections.content: Support may be provided through multiple channels and may be reviewed, ignored, denied, escalated, delayed, or closed at staff discretion. Support responses may be incomplete, delayed, inconsistent, or unofficial.

sections.title: Logging, Monitoring, and Investigation
sections.content: Activity, interactions, messages, sessions, uploads, and support requests may be logged, reviewed, preserved, monitored, investigated, recorded, or analyzed for moderation, security, development, operational, or compliance purposes.

sections.title: Security, Abuse Prevention, and Detection
sections.content: Security systems may store IP addresses and related metadata, flag, review, limit, challenge, or restrict accounts, devices, sessions, or actions, and may detect screenshots, screen recordings, overlays, clipboard activity, modified clients, or suspicious software behavior. Anti-abuse, anti-cheat, fraud, trust, and risk systems may operate automatically or manually and may produce false positives.

sections.title: Exploits, Automation, Scraping, and Interference
sections.content: You may not exploit bugs, bypass safeguards, automate actions, scrape, benchmark, reverse engineer, decompile, interfere with, overload, test, manipulate, or otherwise attack the service or its infrastructure. Unauthorized tools, modified clients, packet manipulation, and similar conduct are prohibited.

sections.title: Alternate Accounts, Sharing, and Transfers
sections.content: Alternate accounts, shared accounts, transfers, lending, trading, or related account abuse are prohibited unless explicitly authorized. Enforcement may apply to linked, associated, or related accounts, devices, sessions, IPs, or other entities.

sections.title: Prohibited Conduct
sections.content: Prohibited conduct includes impersonation, harassment, threats, abusive behavior, false claims, defamatory accusations, unauthorized access attempts, and bypassing or attempting to bypass safeguards.

sections.title: Bans, Restrictions, and Enforcement
sections.content: Staff may restrict, suspend, terminate, or permanently ban access at any time for any reason allowed by these Terms. Enforcement may be silent, retroactive, cross-platform, and not require prior notice or explanation.

sections.title: Service Availability and Feature Changes
sections.content: The service may be changed, removed, redesigned, interrupted, deprecated, reset, migrated, or shut down at any time. Features, APIs, layouts, integrations, and workflows may not remain available or backwards compatible.

sections.title: No Warranty, No Guarantee, and Risk
sections.content: The service is provided on an as-is and as-available basis. No warranty or guarantee is made regarding uptime, functionality, rewards, support, security, or outcomes, and you assume all ordinary risks of use.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability and Claims
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the service and its staff are not liable for damages, losses, disputes, emotional distress, data loss, access issues, financial loss, downtime, or user dissatisfaction arising from use of the service.

sections.title: Browser, Device, and Compatibility Limits
sections.content: The service may behave differently across browsers, devices, operating systems, extensions, networks, or accessibility tools. Graphical, audio, performance, input, rendering, and compatibility issues are your responsibility.

sections.title: External Links and Third-Party Services
sections.content: External links, providers, APIs, authentication systems, hosting services, and other third-party systems may be used. Their content, policies, availability, and failures are outside our responsibility.

sections.title: Messaging, Uploaded Content, and User Submissions
sections.content: Messages, attachments, uploads, media, links, voice, video, and other submitted content may be stored, processed, scanned, logged, reviewed, compressed, modified, removed, displayed, or rejected for operational, moderation, or security purposes.

sections.title: No Professional Advice
sections.content: Nothing provided through the service constitutes legal, financial, medical, technical, or other professional advice.

sections.title: Content Removal, Preservation, and Inactive Accounts
sections.content: Any account data, content, messages, uploads, tickets, logs, or records may be removed, preserved, archived, deleted, reclaimed, anonymized, or unavailable at any time. Backups are your responsibility, and inactive accounts or associated data may be restricted or deleted after extended inactivity.

sections.title: Independence and No Affiliation
sections.content: Unless explicitly stated otherwise, the service is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or partnered with any third party.

sections.title: Analytics, Tracking, and Fingerprinting
sections.content: The service may collect analytics, interaction data, performance metrics, device data, cookies, session replay data, fingerprinting signals, and related tracking information for operational, moderation, development, business, or security purposes.

sections.title: Artificial Intelligence and Automated Processing
sections.content: Artificial intelligence, machine learning, automation, recommendation systems, moderation systems, and behavioral analysis may be used throughout the service and may produce inaccurate, incomplete, delayed, or unintended results.

sections.title: Interface Effects and Client Behavior
sections.content: Animations, sounds, hover effects, transitions, popups, previews, and similar interface behavior may vary by browser or device and may change without notice.

sections.title: Ranking, Recommendations, Advertising, and Monetization
sections.content: Content visibility, rankings, recommendations, search results, advertisements, subscriptions, premium systems, sponsorships, and other monetization features may be prioritized, filtered, reordered, introduced, or removed at any time.

sections.title: Behavioral Profiling and Reputation
sections.content: Accounts, devices, sessions, and actions may be evaluated using behavioral scoring, reputation systems, trust systems, fraud analysis, and risk analysis.

sections.title: Administrative Authority
sections.content: Staff may modify, restrict, approve, deny, revoke, or otherwise manage accounts, rewards, usernames, linked accounts, permissions, and support outcomes at their sole discretion.

sections.title: Appeals and Review Limits
sections.content: Appeals, reviews, reconsiderations, and disputes may be limited, delayed, ignored, denied, or closed at staff discretion, and repeated abuse of appeals systems may result in further restrictions.

sections.title: Temporary Restrictions and Locking
sections.content: Accounts, sessions, tickets, features, or actions may be temporarily restricted, locked, delayed, rate-limited, or suspended for operational or security reasons.

sections.title: Session, Token, and Device Security
sections.content: Sessions, tokens, cookies, devices, and related security states may expire, reset, be quarantined, or be revoked at any time, including for risk, security, or operational reasons.

sections.title: Force Majeure and Infrastructure Limits
sections.content: Failures caused by events outside reasonable control, including providers, hosting, networks, caches, synchronization delays, corruption, or disasters, are not our responsibility.

sections.title: Intellectual Property, Copyright, DMCA, and Trademarks
sections.content: Branding, designs, code, text, graphics, trademarks, and other original service content remain the property of the service or its licensors unless stated otherwise. The service may remove allegedly infringing content and may restrict or terminate accounts associated with repeated infringement.

sections.title: Reserved Rights and No Implied Licenses
sections.content: Any rights not explicitly granted are reserved by the service and its operators. No ownership, licensing, partnership, or other additional rights are implied.

sections.title: Termination of Access and Survival
sections.content: The service may suspend, restrict, revoke, or permanently terminate access at any time. Rights intended to survive termination remain in effect after access ends.

sections.title: Electronic Communications
sections.content: You consent to receive electronic communications, including emails, notifications, verification messages, alerts, announcements, and support responses.

sections.title: Translations and Interpretation
sections.content: Translated, summarized, or machine-generated versions may contain inaccuracies, and the primary language version controls if there is any conflict.

sections.title: Government, Law Enforcement, and Court Orders
sections.content: The service may cooperate with law enforcement, regulators, courts, or governmental authorities and may disclose information where necessary or legally required.

sections.title: Dispute Resolution, Arbitration, and Venue
sections.content: Disputes may be subject to binding arbitration, individual-only claims, waiver of jury trial, and the governing law and venue chosen by the service to the extent permitted by law.

sections.title: Entire Agreement
sections.content: These Terms are the entire agreement between the user and the service and replace prior understandings or communications about the subject matter.

sections.title: Assignment and Service Ownership Changes
sections.content: The service may assign, transfer, merge, sell, restructure, or delegate its rights and obligations at any time, including to successor operators.

sections.title: Export Control and Sanctions
sections.content: You agree not to access or use the service in violation of export laws, sanctions, embargoes, or trade restrictions.

sections.title: Confidential, Beta, and Internal Information
sections.content: Beta, experimental, confidential, unpublished, and internal operational information may be restricted and may not be disclosed, copied, or redistributed.

sections.title: Public Metadata and Archiving
sections.content: Publicly visible data, metadata, identifiers, timestamps, and activity information may be indexed, archived, mirrored, cached, or stored by third parties outside our control.

sections.title: Regional Availability and Content Filtering
sections.content: Features or content may be restricted, filtered, hidden, blocked, or unavailable in certain regions, jurisdictions, devices, or environments.

sections.title: Payments, Subscriptions, Refunds, Chargebacks, and Taxes
sections.content: Subscriptions or paid systems may renew automatically where applicable. Payment disputes, chargebacks, taxes, refunds, reimbursements, replacements, and compensation are handled at our discretion or as required by law.

sections.title: Age Requirement
sections.content: By using the service, you confirm that you meet the minimum age requirements applicable in your jurisdiction and, if required, have permission from a parent or legal guardian.

sections.title: No Backwards Compatibility Guarantee
sections.content: Updates, redesigns, migrations, and new systems may remove compatibility with older versions, workflows, integrations, or setups.

sections.title: No Relationship or Reliance
sections.content: Use of the service does not create employment, partnership, fiduciary, agency, friendship, mentorship, or professional relationships, and users should not rely on the service or staff for social, emotional, financial, or professional dependence.

sections.title: Moderation Standards and Community Rules
sections.content: Published rules, policies, moderation notices, and community guidelines are incorporated into these Terms, and internal moderation standards may be unpublished, dynamic, and confidential.

sections.title: Service Monetization Rights
sections.content: The service may introduce advertisements, subscriptions, premium systems, sponsorships, or other monetization features at any time.

sections.title: Accessibility and Compatibility Notice
sections.content: The service may not function correctly across every device, browser, language, operating system, or accessibility tool, and you are responsible for using an environment that supports the features you choose.

sections.title: Data Security and Risk Acknowledgement
sections.content: Online services involve risks including downtime, exploits, data loss, abuse, unauthorized access, outages, and unexpected behavior. No system is completely secure.

sections.title: Data Aggregation, Anonymization, and Processing
sections.content: Data may be processed, transformed, aggregated, analyzed, or anonymized for operational, analytical, security, moderation, development, or business purposes.
